title: Authoring Documents
description: Write company SOPs from templates, format in the editor, cite and crosswalk regulations, and move documents through review with an audit trail.

steps.caption: Your company documents
steps.narration: The Author tab is your company document library — SOPs, policies, permits and standards, all authored in-app.

steps.caption: A folder for every project
steps.narration: Organise them into project folders down the left.

steps.caption: Create a folder
steps.narration: Create a new folder whenever your work needs one.

steps.caption: SOPs, policies, permits, standards
steps.narration: Every document type lives here, side by side.

steps.caption: Status & ownership at a glance
steps.narration: Each card shows its version, owner, and where it sits — draft, in review, or effective.

steps.caption: Create a new document
steps.narration: To start a new document, click New.

steps.caption: Pick a template family
steps.narration: Choose a template family — OSHA process safety, ISO 9001 quality, FDA design controls, and more.

steps.caption: Pre-structured for you
steps.narration: Each is a specific document — like an operating procedure — pre-structured with the right sections and content blocks.

steps.caption: Create from the template
steps.narration: Create from the template, and your draft is scaffolded in seconds.

steps.caption: Land on your document hub
steps.narration: You land on the document — workflow, linked regulations, assets and comments all one click away.

steps.caption: Open the editor
steps.narration: Click Edit to open the built-in editor.

steps.caption: A familiar toolbar
steps.narration: Format like a word processor — headings, bold, lists and quotes.

steps.caption: Add and edit sections
steps.narration: Add new sections — like a shutdown procedure — right inside the document.

steps.caption: A live section outline
steps.narration: A live outline down the left tracks every section as you write.

steps.caption: Tables, rows and page breaks
steps.narration: Insert tables, rows and columns, and page breaks for a clean, audit-ready export.

steps.caption: Compose beside the source
steps.narration: In the Compose workspace, pull a regulation up beside your draft.

steps.caption: Cite a clause inline
steps.narration: Cite a clause directly. The citation pins to that regulation version, and flags for review if it ever changes.

steps.caption: Open the Clause Crosswalk
steps.narration: Or open the Clause Crosswalk to map your whole document, section by section.

steps.caption: Map sections to clauses
steps.narration: Pick a section on the left and the matching regulation clause on the right.

steps.caption: A traceability matrix
steps.narration: Save the mapping to build the clause-by-clause traceability matrix auditors expect.

steps.caption: Link regulations
steps.narration: Link the document to the regulations it's in scope of — pinned to the version on file.

steps.caption: Link assets
steps.narration: Link the assets it governs, so it's tied into your compliance picture.

steps.caption: Comment & resolve
steps.narration: Reviewers leave comments anchored to paragraphs or clauses, and resolve them as they go.

steps.caption: Move through review
steps.narration: Move the document through the review workflow — submit, request changes, approve.

steps.caption: Sign off with an audit trail
steps.narration: Each step captures an electronic signature, with a full audit trail you can export as a PDF.
